ddls:
CREATE TABLE "individuals" (
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each individual */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the individual */,
  "workclass_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the work class of the individual */,
  "final_weight" INTEGER /* Final weight assigned to the individual in the dataset */,
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the education level of the individual */,
  "education_num" INTEGER /* Number of years of education */,
  "marital_status_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the marital status of the individual */,
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the occupation of the individual */,
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the relationship status of the individual */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the race of the individual */,
  "sex_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sex of the individual */,
  "capital_gain" INTEGER /* Capital gains of the individual */,
  "capital_loss" INTEGER /* Capital losses of the individual */,
  "hours_per_week" INTEGER /* Number of hours worked per week */,
  "native_country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the native country of the individual */,
  "income_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the income category of the individual */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the individual's record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the individual's record was last updated */,
  "data_version_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the version of the dataset the individual's record belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("individual_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_native_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("native_country_id") REFERENCES native_countries ("native_country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_sex_id FOREIGN KEY ("sex_id") REFERENCES sexes ("sex_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_education_id FOREIGN KEY ("education_id") REFERENCES educations ("education_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_income_id FOREIGN KEY ("income_id") REFERENCES incomes ("income_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_marital_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("marital_status_id") REFERENCES marital_statuses ("marital_status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_relationship_id FOREIGN KEY ("relationship_id") REFERENCES relationships ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_workclass_id FOREIGN KEY ("workclass_id") REFERENCES workclasses ("workclass_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_occupation_id FOREIGN KEY ("occupation_id") REFERENCES occupations ("occupation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "workclasses" (
  "workclass_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each work class */,
  "workclass_name" TEXT /* Name of the work class */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the work class */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("workclass_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "educations" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education level */,
  "education_name" TEXT /* Name of the education level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the education level */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marital_statuses" (
  "marital_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marital status */,
  "marital_status_name" TEXT /* Name of the marital status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the marital status */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("marital_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "occupations" (
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each occupation */,
  "occupation_name" TEXT /* Name of the occupation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the occupation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("occupation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship status */,
  "relationship_name" TEXT /* Name of the relationship status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the relationship status */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "races" (
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race */,
  "race_name" TEXT /* Name of the race */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the race */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sexes" (
  "sex_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sex */,
  "sex_name" TEXT /* Name of the sex */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sex */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sex_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "native_countries" (
  "native_country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each native country */,
  "native_country_name" TEXT /* Name of the native country */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the native country */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("native_country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incomes" (
  "income_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each income category */,
  "income_name" TEXT /* Name of the income category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the income category */,
  "income_range" TEXT /* Actual income range for the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("income_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was collected */,
  "data_provider" TEXT /* Organization or entity that provided the data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the quality metric */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the quality metric */,
  "metric_value" TEXT /* Value of the quality metric */,
  "metric_description_long" TEXT /* Detailed description of the quality metric */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_metrics_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_collection_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data collection method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the data collection method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data collection method */,
  "method_description_long" TEXT /* Detailed description of the data collection method */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset version */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the dataset */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the version was released */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data collection method */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES data_collection_methods ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* ID of the individual being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "accessed_by" TEXT /* Name or identifier of the user who accessed the data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access event occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_individual_id FOREIGN KEY ("individual_id") REFERENCES individuals ("individual_id")
)
